overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a medieval tavern interior with warm candlelight and wooden architecture. A female character stands in the foreground observing the space while other patrons occupy background tables and an upper balcony. The character performs a brief hand-to-head gesture midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with upper balcony and fireplace

events.description: character raises right hand to head in a brief salute or thinking gesture

agents.ego_description: standing still facing the tavern interior, then briefly raising hand to head in a gesture

notable_agents.action: standing on upper balcony looking down at the main floor
seated at table near the fireplace

entered.detail: wooden railings on the upper floor overlooking the main tavern area
wooden tavern sign with text mounted on the upper balcony
large stone fireplace with warm fire glowing in the background
wooden tables and benches arranged in the tavern seating area
warm candle-style wall lights mounted on wooden pillars
circular iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit medieval tavern with warm wooden interiors and a prominent upper balcony. The player character stands in the foreground observing the space, which features a stone fireplace, wooden tables, and wall sconces providing ambient lighting. A patron stands on the upper balcony while others sit at tables in the background. Midway through the segment, the character briefly raises their hand to their head in a gesture before returning to a neutral stance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady observation of a dimly lit medieval tavern, maintaining a focused perspective on the atmospheric interior. It begins with the player character standing in the foreground, overlooking a space defined by warm wooden architecture, a stone fireplace, and ambient light from wall sconces. As the camera lingers, the character briefly raises their hand to their head in a subtle gesture before returning to a neutral stance. The scene then expands to reveal the depth of the room, where patrons occupy background tables and a lone figure stands upon the prominent upper balcony.
